description_long: This filing cabinet is a rectangular, boxy structure with a smooth, metallic exterior and distinct paneling on all sides. The front and back faces are divided into four square sections, with the front featuring recessed panels that have a grid-like pattern, suggesting the presence of drawers. The top surface is flat and segmented, suitable for placing items, while the sides are plain with subtle rectangular indents. The cabinet appears robust and industrial, likely constructed from steel or a similar metal, and is designed for secure document storage. There are no visible handles or label holders, giving it a minimalist, utilitarian appearance.
description: A robust, metallic filing cabinet with grid-patterned recessed drawers and a smooth, segmented exterior. Its minimalist design lacks visible handles or label holders.
description_view_0: This view shows a plain side of the cabinet with four smooth, rectangular panels and no visible drawer features.
description_view_1: This view displays the front, featuring four recessed, grid-patterned panels indicating drawers.
description_view_2: This view mirrors view 0, showing another plain side with four smooth, rectangular panels.
description_view_3: This view is similar to view 1, showing the back or another drawer face with four recessed, grid-patterned panels.
